key-partners.title: Key Partners
key-partners.prompt: Who are your key partners and key suppliers?

key-activities.title: Key Activities
key-activities.prompt: What must you do to deliver the value proposition?

key-resources.title: Key Resources
key-resources.prompt: What resources are required to deliver the value proposition?

value-propositions.title: Value Propositions
value-propositions.prompt: What value do you deliver, and what customer need do you satisfy?
examples: Cut bookkeeping time from 5h to 30min per week

customer-relationships.title: Customer Relationships
customer-relationships.prompt: What relationship does each customer segment expect?

channels.title: Channels
channels.prompt: How do your customer segments want to be reached?

customer-segments.title: Customer Segments
customer-segments.prompt: Who are your customers, and who are the most important ones?

cost-structure.title: Cost Structure
cost-structure.prompt: What are the most important costs in this model?

revenue-streams.title: Revenue Streams
revenue-streams.prompt: For what value are customers really willing to pay?
